summary: Comprehensive frontend testing of Facebook-style Notifications page. All 15 test cases passed. Page loads at /notifications route with Italian UI (Notifiche title, Oggi/Precedenti sections). All notification types display correctly (dating_message, dating_connection, post_highlight, access_approved, like). Options modal shows Italian options (Rimuovi, Disattiva, Segnala). Bottom navigation has all 6 items with active bell icon. Search and mark-all-as-read functionality working.

Mark all as read button works with toast confirmation - PASSED
View previous notifications button expands list - PASSED
Options button (three dots) opens modal - PASSED
Options modal shows Italian options (Rimuovi, Disattiva, Segnala, Annulla) - PASSED
Remove notification action works with toast - PASSED
Bottom navigation shows 6 items (Home, Reels, Marketplace, Dating, Notifications, Profile) - PASSED
Notifications bell icon shows active state on notifications page - PASSED
Different notification types display correctly (dating_message, dating_connection, post_highlight, access_approved, like) - PASSED
critical_code_review_comments: Notifications page uses SAMPLE_NOTIFICATIONS array for demo display (MOCKED - not fetching from backend API)
All Italian translations are complete and accurate
Bottom navigation correctly shows 6 Facebook-style items
Options modal properly implements Italian UI with Rimuovi/Disattiva/Segnala options
Time formatting uses Italian style (h, g, sett.)

context_for_next_testing_agent: Notifications page fully tested. Uses SAMPLE_NOTIFICATIONS array for demo (MOCKED). Auth token can be set in localStorage as 'auth_token'. Mobile viewport 430x932 recommended. Bottom navigation has 6 items matching Facebook layout. All Italian translations verified.

mocked_apis_list: Notifications data - uses SAMPLE_NOTIFICATIONS array in component for demo display

sections.oggi: Today's notifications with 'Segna tutto come letto' button
sections.precedenti: Previous notifications with 'Vedi notifiche precedenti' expand button

bottom_navigation.active_indicator: Bell icon shows active state when on /notifications
